data_type_evidence: h-e1/code/config.py:16-19 declares real Hugging Face benchmark datasets: cais/mmlu, truthful_qa (multiple_choice), and allenai/ai2_arc (ARC-Challenge).
h-e1/code/data_loader.py:15-22 loads the benchmark data with load_dataset(self.cfg["hf_id"], self.cfg["config"], split=self.cfg["split"]).
h-e1/code/experiment.log:7-9 records successful real-dataset loads with counts mmlu=14042, truthfulqa=817, arc=1172.
h-e1/code/model_runner.py:51-53, 86-89, and 106-139 loads or saves per-item 4-choice logprob arrays as .npy caches for each base/aligned model pair and dataset.

h-m2/code/analysis_variance.py:50-83 reuses those H-E1 .npy caches via np.load(...); the only synthetic component is the explicitly labeled isotropic sanity control at h-m2/code/analysis_variance.py:348-365.
